heart_count.title: Reach 20 hearts (40 HP) maximum via Lifesteal PvP gains + Heart Crystal crafting

revive_ready.title: Craft a Revive Crystal and store it for emergency use — the Lifesteal death recovery item

subtitle.text: Lifesteal caps at some maximum. Get there. The Revive Crystal is the safety net. Craft it before Ch17 final content.

description: CH.17 · HEART MAXIMUM
▸ Lifesteal is the heart economy mod.',
PvP kill = +1 heart gained.',
PvP/Sculk death = -1 heart lost.',
Floor: 3 hearts minimum (no player goes below).',
Ceiling: there is one — reach it.',
The Revive Crystal is the insurance policy.',
Craft it before you need it.',
◈ LIFESTEAL HEART GAIN SYSTEM
└ PvP kill: +1 heart (only player-vs-player — mob kills do not count)',
└ Multiplayer implication: in solo play, PvP kills are not available',
Use the crystal chain for solo play heart gain',
└ Crystal Fragment → Crystal Core → Heart Crystal → +1 heart',
(full chain in Ch11 revive quest — repeat for max hearts)',
└ Heart Crystal crafting: confirm JEI for lifesteal: recipes',
(crystal_fragment → crystal_core → heart_crystal path)',
└ Floor is 3 hearts — you will never go below',
◈ REVIVE CRYSTAL
└ Revive Crystal: crafted from Heart Crystal + additional materials',
(check JEI: lifesteal:revive_crystal)',
└ Use: when a player dies and their hearts reach 0 in multiplayer,',
a Revive Crystal can restore them',
└ Solo play: functions as emergency HP recovery item',
└ Craft at least 2-3 before Ch17 final boss sequences',
└ Store in dedicated Shulker Box (labeled EMERGENCY)',
◈ MAX HEART GOAL
└ Starting hearts: 10 (vanilla default)',
└ Target: 20 hearts (40 HP) for Ch17 endgame comfort',
└ Each Heart Crystal = +1 heart (+2 HP)',
└ 10 Heart Crystals needed for 20-heart cap',
└ Lifesteal mod cap may be higher — check mod config',
└ LSData API stores heart count cross-session — persistent',
▸ The body has a natural cap.',
Lifesteal says the cap can be raised.',
Every heart above 10 is borrowed from a fight you survived.',
The floor at 3 hearts is the game saying:',
we will not let the body disappear entirely.',
The ceiling is yours to reach.',
Reach it.',
▶ Reach 20 hearts maximum [check]
▶ Craft a Revive Crystal for emergency storage [check]
◇ Revive Crystal priority: have one in your Ender Chest.',
The Ender Chest is always accessible.',
If you die and lose your inventory,',
the Ender Chest has the Revive Crystal.',
This is the correct Lifesteal emergency planning.
